feed.title: Al3xx
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive and feature-rich Jekyll theme for technical writing.

entry.title: Code - HackTheBox Writeup
entry.summary: HackTheBox - Code Difficulty: Easy OS: Linux Author: al3xx Table of Contents Reconnaissance Web Enumeration - Python Code Editor Initial Foothold - Python Sandbox Escape Lateral Movement - SQLite Credential Dump Privilege Escalation - backy.sh Path Traversal Reconnaissance Starting with a full Nmap service scan: nmap -sCV 10.129.4.71 PORT STATE SERVICE VERSION 22...

entry.title: PermX - HackTheBox Writeup
entry.summary: HackTheBox - PermX Difficulty: Easy OS: Linux Author: al3xx Table of Contents Reconnaissance Virtual Host Enumeration Directory Enumeration & Version Fingerprinting Initial Foothold - CVE-2023-4220 (Chamilo RCE) Lateral Movement - Database Credential Reuse Privilege Escalation - Symlink Attack via acl.sh Reconnaissance Standard Nmap service scan: nmap -sCV 10.129...

entry.title: Conversor - HackTheBox Writeup
entry.summary: HackTheBox - Conversor Difficulty: Easy OS: Linux Author: al3xx — Table of Contents Reconnaissance Web Enumeration Source Code Review Initial Foothold - Path Traversal + Cron RCE Lateral Movement - SQLite Credential Dump Privilege Escalation - needrestart Misconfiguration Reconnaissance Started with a standard Nmap service scan: nmap -sC -sV 10.129.238.31 PORT STAT...

entry.title: LinkVortex - HackTheBox Writeup
entry.summary: HackTheBox - LinkVortex Difficulty: Easy OS: Linux Author: al3xx 1. Reconnaissance Port Scanning sudo nmap -sC -sV 10.129.231.194 PORT STATE SERVICE VERSION 22/tcp open ssh OpenSSH 8.9p1 Ubuntu 3ubuntu0.10 (Ubuntu Linux; protocol 2.0) 80/tcp open http Apache httpd |_http-title: Did not follow redirect to http://linkvortex.htb/ |_http-server-header: Apache Virtual Hos...

entry.title: Titanic - HackTheBox Writeup
entry.summary: Difficulty: Easy OS: Linux Author: al3xx Reconnaissance Port Scan sudo nmap -sC -sV 10.129.231.221 PORT STATE SERVICE VERSION 22/tcp open ssh OpenSSH 8.9p1 Ubuntu 3ubuntu0.10 (Ubuntu Linux; protocol 2.0) | ssh-hostkey: | 256 73:03:9c:76:eb:04:f1:fe:c9:e9:80:44:9c:7f:13:46 (ECDSA) |_ 256 d5:bd:1d:5e:9a:86:1c:eb:88:63:4d:5f:88:4b:7e:04 (ED25519) 80/tcp open http Apache httpd ...
